steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures on each side of the blank
steps.content:
Left of blank: set out to provide a wide-ranging overview of photography in the 1920s through the 1950s is an independent clause.

Right of blank: given the collection's breadth of more than 120 photos, its efforts were largely successful is an independent clause preceded by a participial phrase.

steps.title: Apply the rule for joining independent clauses
steps.content:
Coordinating conjunctions joining independent clauses require a comma before them.

The correct answer uses 1950s, and, which correctly follows this pattern—the comma separates the first clause from the conjunction that introduces the second.

The other choices either drop the comma (B, D) or omit the conjunction (C), each violating the rule for joining independent clauses.
A is correct.
